commands.help.model: Show or switch the Keeper's LLM provider/model.
commands.model.usage: Usage: .model [list | set <provider> [chat_model] | login <chatgpt|supergrok> | logout <provider> | key <api_key> | reset]
commands.model.show: LLM: provider {provider}, chat model {chat_model}, base_url {base_url}, api_key {api_key}. Override: {override}
commands.model.list: Providers — OpenAI-compatible: {compatible}; native: {native}; subscription: {subscription}. Any OpenAI-compatible endpoint works by pointing base_url at it. Subscription providers need `.model login` first.
commands.model.denied: Only a group admin or Keeper can change the LLM configuration.
commands.model.unknown_provider: Unknown provider: {provider}. Use .model list to see the options.
commands.model.set_done: LLM switched to provider {provider}, chat model {chat_model}.
commands.model.set_saved: Saved LLM override: provider {provider}, chat model {chat_model} (takes effect on restart).
commands.model.set_failed: Could not switch to provider {provider} (its SDK or API key may be missing). Kept the previous LLM; nothing was saved.
commands.model.key_public: Set the API key from a private/DM or the local CLI, not a public channel.
commands.model.reset_done: LLM override cleared. Reverted to provider {provider}, chat model {chat_model}.
commands.model.login_required: Provider {provider} needs a subscription login first. Run: .model login {provider}
commands.model.login_started: Login started for {provider}. Open {url} and enter code: {code}. Waiting in the background (up to 10 minutes)…
commands.model.login_pending: Login for {provider} is already in progress. Open {url} and enter code: {code}.
commands.model.login_failed: Could not start subscription login. Try again later.
commands.model.login_chatgpt_no_imagegen: Note: ChatGPT subscription does not include image generation on this channel.
